summary: Complete testing of CSV and PDF export functionality for Admin and Organizer dashboards. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend export controls verified working with Playwright.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/payments/export?format=csv - Returns valid CSV with semicolon delimiter and UTF-8 BOM
GET /api/admin/payments/export?format=pdf - Returns valid PDF with %PDF- header
GET /api/admin/payments/export?format=pdf&start_date=X&end_date=Y - Date filter works for PDF
Unauthenticated requests get 401 on export endpoints
CSV contains correct headers: Participant, Email, Événement, Course, Prix base, Frais service 5%, Total payé, Frais Stripe, Organisateur, Net plateforme, Statut, Date
CSV uses UTF-8 BOM encoding for Excel compatibility
CSV includes TOTAL footer row with aggregated values
PDF generated in landscape A4 format using fpdf2
Frontend Admin dashboard has export controls with Date début, Date fin inputs and Export CSV, Export PDF buttons
Frontend Organizer dashboard has 'Relevé de paiements' section with Du, Au date pickers and CSV/PDF buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export feature (CSV/PDF) is complete. Admin dashboard has export controls on Paiements tab with date filters. Organizer dashboard has 'Relevé de paiements' section. CSV uses semicolon delimiter and UTF-8-BOM. PDF uses fpdf2 in landscape A4. Both only include completed (PAYÉ) payments. Sophie Test has completed payment (36.75€ on 2026-03-11). Pierre Martin has old transaction (65€, no service fee - pre-commission model).

export_feature_details.date_filter: Optional start_date and end_date query parameters
